bug_found_and_fixed_during_real_verifica: Adding COPILOT_AUTOMATION_COST_PROFILE_LOCKED_v1.md as a real file caused 50 false-positive violations on first run, because that file documents forbidden model/effort/trigger terms as its own content (a 'forbidden list' necessarily contains the forbidden words). Same self-reference class of bug as the canon file hit in the previous batch. Fixed by adding it to exclude_globs. Re-ran and confirmed: self-scan now shows exactly 23 violations, all RCP5_audit_staleness, nothing else - proven by inspecting unique rule_ids in the JSON report, not just eyeballing console output.
